tweet:
merged 41 PRs this week.

- added suno-v5, step-3.5-flash, and flux-2-dev (now with img2img)
- @pollinations_ai/sdk gets STT & media uploads
- normalized openai finish_reasons so your wrappers stop breaking
- 22 new community apps

infra is holding.
alt_tweet:
quiet week. just 41 merged PRs.

flux-2-dev, step-3.5-flash, and suno-v5 are now live. we also taught the sdk how to handle speech-to-text and media uploads. plus 20+ new community apps added to the showcase.

time to build something weird.
image_prompt: Cozy 8-bit pixel art scene of a retro RPG quest board. A cute pixel bee mascot with a tiny adventurer's scarf pins a glowing note to the board. The board has chunky pixel text 'WEEKLY WRAP' at the top. Below are retro UI wooden panels with pixel text: 'FLUX-2-DEV', 'SUNO-V5', and 'SDK UPGRADES'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
reasoning: Lists specific models and SDK features without hype. Uses understated humor ('infra is holding', 'quiet week'). Fits the RPG quest/achievement board visual for the weekly recap.
